isi.lyrics:
Lyric Owen - 멍 (TANTRUM) (feat. The Quiett)

Romanization

!@#$%^&*

I've been going up and going down
yata boyeonneunde I'm falling down
No other way idc abt making I'mma just do it now
Ain't no other way came a long way and you know it took some time

All my losses yeah it's my fault, geuraedo alji raep gwansim eomneun geon
hiphap paeniraneun koseutyum beoseo cheokhaji ma sarangeun eopseo
I see you plotting for a chance, geunyang iyongdanghagieneun
ije na meotdaero jotkkago dance, gyeouredo an meomchwo heureuji rain gyesok gyesok gyesok

meong! doneul stack meokgosalgi wihae aesseo, chosimeul chajeurae neon doragagopa
maen cheoeum? dasi hal su isseodo an hae, gyeongheomeul nujeok dojeon hu morph ->
Next one cheoreopseul su eopseo bonginhan tantrum seuseuro georeo choemyeon
jal garyeo baebyeon seonggwareul naeji eojedo nan handsome

!@#$%^&* All my losses I've made
(All my losses made me better) All my losses I've made eopjilleojin sigan can't take back
(siganeun mot doedollyeo) mot dakka let it drip like that eongdeongi keumyeon baby, back back
(Baby back it up!) Do I look like I give a fuck? NEH haneure sori jilleo let it echo

nan jal mata naemsae wanjeon gaeko, ne heopunge daemunja, "DAMN."
Fuck boy thought he was living large & famous, you lil bitch ass jeoldae ani dangerous
geujjogeuro deonjilge badabwa tantrum, ya imma na ige hangsang maenjeongsin
jeonggeure dochakhaesseul ttae maenson, fuck being a loser I break hearts, game on

I've been going up and going down
yata boyeonneunde I'm falling down
I've been going up and going down
yata boyeonneunde I'm falling down

They don't know $hit about this $hit charari mideo nan misin
jeoldaero ijeoseon andwae cheombuteo honjayeotdaneun geol
sumaneun gokdeulgwa maneun verse deuri nareul seolmyeonghae my life is nothin but
Beats and rappin no chakgangma ije sijagini nae ireumeul saegilge

yeongwonhi, sesangi byeonhal ttae nan doenoeeo imi da gyeokkeobwatdeon geoji
myeot beonssik, gyeongjaengi sahoeui munjeramyeon then I murder my
Opposites ay I'm gettin money like that
ne geotdo naega beoreo daesin eonjena singgo itji saesin

!@#$%^&* All my losses I've made
(All my losses made me better) All my losses I've made eopjilleojin sigan can't take back
(siganeun mot doedollyeo) mot dakka let it drip like that eongdeongi keumyeon baby, back back
(Baby back it up!) Do I look like I give a fuck? NEH haneure sori jilleo let it echo

nan jal mata naemsae wanjeon gaeko, ne heopunge daemunja, "DAMN."
Fuck boy thought he was living large & famous, you lil bitch ass jeoldae ani dangerous
geujjogeuro deonjilge badabwa tantrum, ya imma na ige hangsang maenjeongsin
jeonggeure dochakhaesseul ttae maenson, fuck being a loser I break hearts, game on

I've been going up and going down
yata boyeonneunde I'm falling down
I've been going up and going down
yata boyeonneunde I'm falling down

Hangeul

!@#$%^&*

I've been going up and going down
얕아 보였는데 I'm falling down
No other way idc abt making I'mma just do it now
Ain't no other way came a long way and you know it took some time

All my losses yeah it's my fault, 그래도 알지 랩 관심 없는 건
힙합 팬이라는 코스튬 벗어 척하지 마 사랑은 없어
I see you plotting for a chance, 그냥 이용당하기에는
이제 나 멋대로 좆까고 dance, 겨울에도 안 멈춰 흐르지 rain 계속 계속 계속

멍! 돈을 stack 먹고살기 위해 애써, 초심을 찾으래 넌 돌아가고파
맨 처음? 다시 할 수 있어도 안 해, 경험을 누적 도전 후 morph ->
Next one 철없을 수 없어 봉인한 tantrum 스스로 걸어 최면
잘 가려 배변 성과를 내지 어제도 난 handsome

!@#$%^&* All my losses I've made
(All my losses made me better) All my losses I've made 엎질러진 시간 can't take back
(시간은 못 되돌려) 못 닦아 let it drip like that 엉덩이 크면 baby, back back
(Baby back it up!) Do I look like I give a fuck? NEH 하늘에 소리 질러 let it echo

난 잘 맡아 냄새 완전 개코, 네 허풍에 대문자, "DAMN."
Fuck boy thought he was living large & famous, you lil bitch ass 절대 아니 dangerous
그쪽으로 던질게 받아봐 tantrum, 야 인마 나 이게 항상 맨정신
정글에 도착했을 때 맨손, fuck being a loser I break hearts, game on

I've been going up and going down
얕아 보였는데 I'm falling down
I've been going up and going down
얕아 보였는데 I'm falling down

They don't know $hit about this $hit 차라리 믿어 난 미신
절대로 잊어선 안돼 첨부터 혼자였다는 걸
수많은 곡들과 많은 verse 들이 나를 설명해 my life is nothin but
Beats and rappin no 착각마 이제 시작이니 내 이름을 새길게

영원히, 세상이 변할 때 난 되뇌어 이미 다 겪어봤던 거지
몇 번씩, 경쟁이 사회의 문제라면 then I murder my
Opposites ay I'm gettin money like that
네 것도 내가 벌어 대신 언제나 신고 있지 새신

!@#$%^&* All my losses I've made
(All my losses made me better) All my losses I've made 엎질러진 시간 can't take back
(시간은 못 되돌려) 못 닦아 let it drip like that 엉덩이 크면 baby, back back
(Baby back it up!) Do I look like I give a fuck? NEH 하늘에 소리 질러 let it echo

난 잘 맡아 냄새 완전 개코, 네 허풍에 대문자, "DAMN."

그쪽으로 던질게 받아봐 tantrum, 야 인마 나 이게 항상 맨정신
정글에 도착했을 때 맨손, fuck being a loser I break hearts, game on

I've been going up and going down
얕아 보였는데 I'm falling down
I've been going up and going down
얕아 보였는데 I'm falling down

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Owen - 천사 (ANGEL)

Romanization

It's about you, you and me
We kinda cute, an bukkeureopji hanado what are you saying?
noraee chumchugo sipeul ttae mangseoriji ana neon, gisang iljik
Early in the morn achimeul maji gabyeopge jogingeul nagaji healthy and daily

urineun tim just put me in there harue kkeuteneun call me
Mr. Kim like David and Chris but one and only
neol bogo isseumyeon gamanhi itjil mothae gojang na soni
neoraneun fieldreul nubineun nae gibun jigeum wanjeon Spurs like Sonny

jageuk so Marv it's souly, ne sarangeul eummihae solely
neon aniya norm you a 10, got your useonsunwi in lane
ne dwitae nun mot tte, wanjeon apeurodite
I see an angel when I open my eyes just like that

Yeah galsaek nun gin saengmeori
She a model ganeun heorie neolbeun golban keun eongdeongi
gin dari machi girin, maeum cham gopgo aju yeorin
She an angel, nan namukkun seonnyeoreul ireobeorin

Fuck MBTI these words come from my heart
jebeop jal mireo P ne maeume nal park
doraol georan saenggage deo gireojin saenggak
neol ilgo nan gumeonge chaewo neoeun hiphap

Can't fuck with a hoe, my love too real to hold
seoul gyeoulcheoreom cold hearted, hiphabi nal wonhae always
nae hoheup hanggadeuk dok ㄱㄴㄷㄹ go
geojin jangnaniya no I'm just tryna make some dough

For my team gwaenchana gado low
tikkeul moa taesan so I'm always grinding for some more
gakkeum geuriwo wake & bake on bong, when I'm sky high used to send you songs
neowaui daehwa machi medicine, neon yuilhan nae swimteo that's why I want you

Yo imagine all these daughters lungeing on me but I ain't with ya
Met a Swedish girl feisty but I ain't with ya
'Nother girl said 4uck me simyeon got me fucked up
Without you I'm nothing baby for real I still miss you...

Yeah galsaek nun gin saengmeori
She a model ganeun heorie neolbeun golban keun eongdeongi
gin dari machi girin, maeum cham gopgo aju yeorin
She an angel, nan namukkun seonnyeoreul ireobeorin

Fuck MBTI these words come from my heart
jebeop jal mireo P ne maeume nal park
doraol georan saenggage deo gireojin saenggak
neol ilgo nan gumeonge chaewo neoeun hiphap

eotteoge jinaesseo?
Mm.. I've been okay, you know yesterday we had hoesik how come you didn't come?
I was at uhh I was in @#$% recording
a.. we were talking about you

We?
Uh.. the people and I?
Ahh damn u lying
No we were, we missed you

Why would, why would they talk about me? I'm, I'm like uhh I'm a trouble maker Ion want.. nobody talking about me
We were talking about how like..

Hangeul

It's about you, you and me
We kinda cute, 안 부끄럽지 하나도 what are you saying?
노래에 춤추고 싶을 때 망설이지 않아 넌, 기상 일직
Early in the morn 아침을 맞이 가볍게 조깅을 나가지 healthy and daily

우리는 팀 just put me in there 하루에 끝에는 call me
Mr. Kim like David and Chris but one and only
널 보고 있으면 가만히 있질 못해 고장 나 손이
너라는 field를 누비는 내 기분 지금 완전 Spurs like Sonny

자극 so Marv it's souly, 네 사랑을 음미해 solely
넌 아니야 norm you a 10, got your 우선순위 in lane
네 뒤태 눈 못 떼, 완전 아프로디테
I see an angel when I open my eyes just like that

Yeah 갈색 눈 긴 생머리

긴 다리 마치 기린, 마음 참 곱고 아주 여린
She an angel, 난 나무꾼 선녀를 잃어버린

Fuck MBTI these words come from my heart
제법 잘 밀어 P 네 마음에 날 park
돌아올 거란 생각에 더 길어진 생각
널 잃고 난 구멍에 채워 넣은 힙합

Can't fuck with a hoe, my love too real to hold
서울 겨울처럼 cold hearted, 힙합이 날 원해 always
내 호흡 한가득 독 ㄱㄴㄷㄹ go
거진 장난이야 no I'm just tryna make some dough

For my team 괜찮아 가도 low
티끌 모아 태산 so I'm always grinding for some more
가끔 그리워 wake & bake on bong, when I'm sky high used to send you songs
너와의 대화 마치 medicine, 넌 유일한 내 쉼터 that's why I want you

Yo imagine all these daughters lungeing on me but I ain't with ya

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Owen - 눈물 (TEARS)

Romanization

Thought this time
I found the right one
But all this time
You've said that, "I'm done..."

Ups and downs, don't you frown
You and I, we were designed
To be different, meoritsogeun sikkeul
jigeum eonnagago isseo seoroui mideum

Telling me you don't want to believe the things I say
How should I lay things down?
uimi buyeo haji mallan geureon neoui mal sok uimiwa
buyeodoen neoui saenggak

I've tried and tried to say what's on my mind
When everybody left, betrayed me, thought you were on my side
butjaba jugil nal, maneun geol baraesseo
seotulleoseo mian uriui time is gone

Gone uriui time is gone
Gone uriui time is gone
Gone uriui time is gone
Gone gone gone

Can you tell me how you feel these days?
Can you txt me if you miss me bae?
Cus I've been longing and missing, wanna see you
jaju eonnagan gwanggyega silsu

deo jal hal su isseonneunde
neon imi jeo meolli tteonaganne
It's alright, everything's gon be okay
It's a blessing and a curse, same thing

Telling me you don't want to believe the things I say
How should I lay things down?
uimi buyeo haji mallan geureon neoui mal sok uimiwa
buyeodoen neoui saenggak

I've tried and tried to say what's on my mind
When everybody left, betrayed me, thought you were on my side
butjaba jugil nal, maneun geol baraesseo
seotulleoseo mian uriui time is gone

Gone uriui time is gone
Gone uriui time is gone
Gone uriui time is gone
Gone gone gone

I found the right one
But all this time
You've said that, "I'm done..."

You and I, we were designed
To be different, meoritsogeun sikkeul
jigeum eonnagago isseo seoroui mideum

Hangeul

Thought this time
I found the right one
But all this time
You've said that, "I'm done..."

Ups and downs, don't you frown
You and I, we were designed
To be different, 머릿속은 시끌
지금 엇나가고 있어 서로의 믿음

Telling me you don't want to believe the things I say
